summary: M386 — End-of-milestone audit fixes from parallel code-reviewer / performance-engineer / game-developer agents. CombatScreen _updateHud now dirty-checks every per-frame DOM write (status row innerHTML was the worst offender). meter.events ring capped at 2000 entries. Boss-intro splash gate replaced per-frame querySelector with a boolean flag. NG+ act-shift cap raised 6→10 with actMultipliers extended to acts 7-10 so NG+2+ no longer flatlines every zone to the Act-6 ceiling. Added partySize validate guard, prologue act-0 backfill default, and SkillTree _tabPinned reset. Workspace AGENTS.md added with subagent_type quickref for the vanilla-JS+Vite+canvas RPG stack, mirrored into CLAUDE.md and new_game_template/CLAUDE.md.
